summary: The engineer built a crypto trading SaaS platform, developed low-level input drivers and firmware, conducted AI research on price prediction and computer vision for poker, and created multiple trading bots. Emphasis on full-stack development, ML experiments, and hardware interfaces.

items.title: Windows input driver development
items.description: Built a KMDF-based Windows driver for filtering and injecting keyboard and mouse events.

items.title: Summit crypto trading platform
items.description: Developed major features for a SaaS crypto trading platform, including proxy infrastructure, quickstart templates, billing model, and security hardening.

items.title: Firmware variant v13
items.description: Added new firmware variant for ESP32-S3 input emulation device.

items.title: intag2 metadata handling
items.description: Improved file-tagging utility's handling of desktop.ini entries and changelog generation.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Ran extensive experiments on ensemble and MoE architectures for crypto price prediction models, achieving new benchmarks.

items.title: On-device LLM assistant for Android
items.description: Built an Android LLM assistant with sub-agent delegation, tool routing, and chat interface.

items.title: Dual-core and USB firmware
items.description: Released v12 (dual-core) and v13 (USB) versions of the input emulation firmware.

items.title: CI/CD for intag2 Windows utility
items.description: Set up automated build, release, and Microsoft Store publishing pipelines for the intag2 file-tagging application.

items.title: Computer vision for online poker
items.description: Developed a pipeline for real-time hand detection, card recognition, and state recovery in online poker games.

items.title: Firmware COM restart fix
items.description: Fixed graceful restart handling in the input emulation firmware.

items.title: intag2 metadata extension
items.description: Added support for additional metadata properties in the Windows file-tagging utility.

items.title: Input emulation firmware upgrades
items.description: Iterated on multiple firmware versions (v7-v11), adding USB/BLE connectivity, touch, and mouse features for ESP32 devices.

items.title: Freqtrade trading strategies
items.description: Developed and optimized a suite of trading strategies for the Freqtrade bot, focusing on parameter tuning and performance.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy experimentation
items.description: Created and hyperoptimized trading strategies for the Freqtrade crypto trading bot.

items.title: Crypto signal bot development
items.description: Built a Telegram bot for crypto trading signals, integrating AI and technical analysis.

items.title: intag2 early development
items.description: Started building a Windows Explorer file-tagging utility with CLI and UI features.
